title: RulesetSchema
description: A versioned, immutable set of policy rules evaluated by the AutoCode Policy Engine. Once a ruleset_version has been referenced by any PolicyDecision, its rule contents must never be mutated — changes require a new version.

ruleset_schema_version.description: Version of this schema itself (the shape of a ruleset document).

ruleset_version.description: Semantic version of this specific rule content. Immutable once published/referenced.

precedence.description: Pure, declarative precedence order for resolving multiple matched rules. Higher index in the array = higher severity = wins.

effect_order.description: Ordered from lowest to highest severity.

default_effect_on_unknown_risk.description: Structural guarantee: risk_tier == 'unknown' always maps to this effect, regardless of matched rules. Must not be 'allow'.

default_effect_on_no_match.description: MVP fail-closed principle: an ActionProposal that matches zero rules is not implicitly allowed. Must not be 'allow' — anything meant to be permitted by default must be an explicit allow rule (e.g. READ_ONLY_ACTIONS_ALLOWED), not a fallback.

rule_id.description: Stable, unique identifier. Never reused across rulesets for a different meaning.

description.description: Human-readable explanation, for audit/debugging only. Never used in decision logic.

approvable.description: Whether a valid, role-matching HILDecision can override this rule's effect to 'allow'. MUST be false when effect == 'deny_permanent' (enforced by validator, not just convention).

required_approver_roles.description: Roles authorized to approve this rule via HIL. Required and non-empty when approvable == true.

condition.description: Deterministic matcher evaluated against an ActionProposal + RiskAssessment. No LLM evaluation permitted here.

risk_tiers.description: Restricts this rule to specific risk tiers. Omit to match any tier.
